title: Sub-brands declare relationship, inheritance, and lifecycle
summary: Every offering explicitly chooses master-branded, endorsed, or independent architecture with governed overrides.
guidance: Base family decisions on audience, trust, ownership, risk, lifecycle, and recognition before composing lockups.
do: Version naming, migration, aliases, and deprecation
dont: Turn each campaign into a permanent sub-brand
Treat missing inheritance rules as designer discretion
verification: Family graph, allowed-override, naming, ownership, and lifecycle validation
